items.description: Line item on an opportunity tying a catalog product, quantity, and pricing to the deal, with optional manual price override.
Formal, versioned price proposal generated from an opportunity, with an effective expiry date and running total.
Line item on a quote carrying quantity, unit price, tax, and extended amount.
Line item on a sales order carrying ordered quantity, unit price, extended amount, and quantity shipped.
Billing document generated from a confirmed order, with a due date and payment status.
Named price list (territory/currency scoped) that holds product price list items and an effective date range.
Rival vendor tracked against opportunities for competitive intelligence, with SWOT notes.
Sales target rollup for a user or team over a fiscal period, comparing target versus actual.
Geographic or segment territory used to align sales reps and price lists.
Marketing campaign that sources leads and opportunities, shared with the Marketing module.

tags.processCatalogL3: 85.45.300 Nurture opportunities and finalize the sale

items.description: Contoso-invented governance record capturing deal-desk approval of non-standard discount/terms on strategic opportunities before a quote can be presented.
Contoso-invented reference table holding methodology guidance and recommended next actions keyed to opportunity sales stage.
Virtual/dual-write surface over the Finance & Operations customer settlement/payment table, letting sellers see AR payment status against invoices without leaving Sales.
Activity that records the resolution of a case, including resolution notes and total billable time captured at closure.
Defines the level and terms of support a customer is eligible for, including allocation of hours or case counts and applicable SLA.
Reusable template that standardizes entitlement terms, channels, and product coverage applied when provisioning customer entitlements.

tags.processCatalogL3: 20.40.200 Create and track service level agreements

items.description: Individual KPI line within an SLA specifying the metric, applicable-when conditions, success criteria, warning and failure time thresholds.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: Container for work items (cases, activities) used for routing and load-balancing across support teams and tiers.

tags.processCatalogL3: 20.40.070 Track additional information against a case

items.description: Represents a single work item placed in a queue, tracking who it is worked by and when it entered the queue.
Omnichannel session record representing a live agent conversation across chat, voice, or messaging channels; linked to a case via the associated live work item.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: Support contract defining coverage period, billing, and contract lines; legacy service model preceding entitlements, still used for warranty tracking.
Survey definition from Dynamics 365 Customer Voice used to collect post-case CSAT and NPS feedback.
Contoso-invented table logging self-service and bot deflection events, tying an attempted case to the knowledge article or bot topic that resolved it before agent involvement.
Contoso custom table tracking formal case escalations to tier-2/tier-3 or management, with reason, target team, and re-assignment audit.
Contoso custom table normalizing inbound CSAT/NPS survey responses into a single reportable record linked to case and agent for CoE dashboards.
Virtual/dual-write table surfacing Finance & Operations warranty and service agreements into Dataverse so warranty coverage from F&O is visible when triaging and resolving cases.
Products (parts) used or estimated on a work order. Drives inventory decrement on completion when line status moves to Used.
Labor/services estimated or performed on a work order, priced by duration and drawn from the product catalog (services are catalog products).
A scheduled block of time reserving a bookable resource against a work order (or other bookable entity).
Describes the scheduling constraints (duration, territory, skills, time window) that Resource Scheduling Optimization and the schedule board use to fulfill a work order.
Authorizes the return of products from a customer (or between warehouses) prior to receipt and disposition.
Tracks on-hand, allocated, and available quantities of a product at a specific warehouse (including truck stock).
A physical or logical stocking location (depot or truck) against which inventory is tracked.
Contoso-invented pre-work safety/compliance checklist a technician must complete and sign off before starting a hazardous work order.
Contoso-invented reference table defining penalty tiers and credit amounts applied when an agreement-backed work order breaches its response SLA.
Finance & Operations purchase order surfaced into Dataverse via dual-write so field service can replenish truck stock against SCM procurement without leaving the model-driven app.
Work breakdown structure task belonging to a project schedule; drives scheduling, dependencies, and resource assignment.
A member (named or generic/requirement-based) of a project team, mapping bookable resources to a project.
Assignment linking a project team member to a project task with an effort distribution across the task date range.
The contract (a specialized Sales Order) governing billing terms, contract lines, and customer for the project engagement.
A billing arrangement line (Time & Material or Fixed Price) on a project contract, driving invoicing and revenue recognition.
Header for a project estimate rollup produced during the sales/planning phase.
A single line of the estimate — a transaction-typed (hours/expense/material) cost and sales projection for a period.
Immutable cost/sales actuals ledger generated from time, expense, and journal entries; the source of margin and WIP reporting.
Project-based invoice generated from confirmed actuals and contract billing schedules; drives customer billing and revenue posting.
Contoso-invented governance record: a periodic RAG health assessment of a project used by the delivery PMO, capturing risk, schedule variance, and margin status.
Contoso-invented intake record bridging a generic project team requirement and the resourcing desk fulfillment workflow.

Environment-level configuration table for Project Operations holding integration mode, default journal, and time-capture settings; in a dual-write deployment these values synchronize from Finance & Operations project accounting.
Virtual entity surfacing project-related vendor/subcontractor invoices from Finance & Operations for read-only cost visibility on the project record.
Real-time marketing channel template (SMS/push/custom channel) that binds journey steps to a delivery provider and message format.
Real-time marketing form for capturing leads/contacts on landing pages, mapped to Dataverse target entity fields.
Rule-based lead scoring model definition producing grades and thresholds for sales-ready qualification in real-time marketing.
Registration record linking a contact to an event, driving attendance journeys and reminders.
Consent center record tracking channel-level opt-in/opt-out (email, SMS, custom) and purpose-based consent for a contact point.
Real-time marketing custom/business trigger definition that starts or branches trigger-based journeys from signals.
Contoso custom intake record capturing the marketing campaign brief, budget request, and stakeholder approvals before a journey is built.
Contoso custom library of region-specific legal/unsubscribe footer HTML snippets referenced by marketing emails for compliance.
Virtual entity surfacing committed marketing spend and PO lines from Finance & Operations via a virtual entity provider, for budget-vs-actual on campaign briefs.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.010 Manage the initial synchronization of data

items.description: A registered source system feeding data into CI-Data (Dataverse, ADLS Gen2, Azure Synapse, Microsoft Fabric OneLake, Salesforce, Power Query connector). Governs ingestion connection and refresh schedule.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.020 Manage the recurring synchronization of data

items.description: A source table/entity mapped into the CI-Data data model, with attribute mappings and semantic-type assignments used during unification.

tags.processCatalogL3: 50.65.525 Analyze and segment customers and markets

items.description: An out-of-box or custom (AutoML) ML prediction model (churn, CLV, product recommendation) scoring unified profiles on a scheduled cadence.

tags.processCatalogL3: 50.65.525 Analyze and segment customers and markets

items.description: The scored output row linking a prediction model to a unified profile with the numeric probability/score value produced at last scoring.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.020 Manage the recurring synchronization of data

items.description: A unified timeline activity (purchase, web visit, support case, email open) attributed to a customer profile from any ingested source.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.020 Manage the recurring synchronization of data

items.description: Household / B2C relationship-graph edges between unified profiles (member-of-household, works-at). Directed from/to profile references drive the relationship graph.
Contoso-built GDPR/CCPA consent and data-subject-rights ledger. Records marketing/analytics consent grants and DSR (delete/export) requests per unified profile for compliance auditing.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.020 Manage the recurring synchronization of data

items.description: Contoso-authored deterministic/fuzzy match-rule overrides layered on top of the OOB unification match config, versioned for auditability and environment traceability.
Contoso operational monitoring table capturing per-refresh ingestion health, row deltas, and data-quality scores for each registered data source.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.020 Manage the recurring synchronization of data

items.description: Finance & Operations customer master (CustTable / CustCustomerV3Entity) surfaced into Dataverse as an mserp_ virtual entity over the F&O OData endpoint, used to enrich unified profiles with financial credit limit and payment terms.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.010 Manage the initial synchronization of data

items.description: Maps ingested attributes to standardized semantic types (Person.Email, Person.FullName, Address.PostalCode) that drive the unification and enrichment engine.

Chart-of-accounts main account surfaced from Dynamics 365 Finance (F&O) into Dataverse via dual-write (mserp_ virtual entity). Represents the general-ledger account definitions used to classify posted journal entries.
The legal-entity ledger definition (accounting currency, reporting currency, fiscal calendar, chart of accounts) dual-written from D365 Finance. Scopes GL activity to a single company/DataAreaId.

Posted GL account entries (ledger transaction lines with debit/credit amounts by main account) surfaced from D365 Finance via dual-write. High-volume, read-mostly virtual entity used for financial reporting in Dataverse.
Accounts Payable pending/posted vendor invoice header dual-written from D365 Finance. Contoso extends AP approval routing via a related custom con_apapprovalrequest table.
Accounts Receivable customer payment journal lines surfaced from D365 Finance for AR clerks working in Dataverse against open customer balances.
Budget register entries (original and revised budget amounts by main account and financial dimension) from D365 Finance budgeting, surfaced for budget control checks.
Fixed-asset register (acquisition, depreciation books, net book value, disposal) surfaced from D365 Finance. Contoso adds a con_capexrequest custom table that provisions new assets.
Sales-tax / VAT transaction posted amounts by tax code, dual-written from D365 Finance for indirect-tax compliance reporting.

The dual-write Company (legal entity) reference table used to scope all Finance records to a DataAreaId. Standard Finance & Operations integration table (cdm_ prefix) provisioned in Dataverse by dual-write.
Contoso-custom accounts-payable approval workflow record wrapping a dual-write vendor invoice with a multi-tier approval chain and audit trail in Dataverse.
Contoso-custom capital-expenditure request that feeds the fixed-asset acquisition process once approved and budget-checked against the budget register.
Contoso-custom reference table mapping Dataverse business units / cost centers to F&O financial-dimension combinations for consolidated reporting.
Contoso-custom collections/dunning action log tracking outreach on overdue AR balances per customer account, driving escalation levels.

F&O ReleasedProductsV2 entity surfaced in Dataverse via dual-write (msdyn_releasedproduct). Master item enabled for a legal entity/site; the source of truth for item numbers referenced across PO, sales, and warehouse tables.
F&O InventWarehouses entity (InventLocationId) surfaced via dual-write. Physical warehouse within a site; WMS-enabled warehouses drive advanced warehouse mobile flows.
F&O PurchaseOrderHeadersV2 surfaced via dual-write (msdyn_purchaseorderheader). PurchTable equivalent in Dataverse; header-level vendor, status, and delivery data for procurement visibility.
F&O PurchaseOrderLinesV2 surfaced via dual-write (msdyn_purchaseorderline). PurchLine equivalent; line-level item, quantity, and receiving-warehouse detail.
F&O SalesOrderLines surfaced via dual-write (msdyn_salesorderline). SalesLine equivalent, used for allocation/reservation and outbound ship confirmation in SCM.

Contoso supplier master mirroring F&O VendVendorV2, held natively in Dataverse for supplier collaboration/portal, approval, and on-time-delivery scorecarding scenarios that F&O does not expose to external users.
Contoso pre-PO intake capturing internal requests before F&O purchase order creation; drives multi-stage approval, vendor selection, and write-back of the generated PO number from F&O.
Contoso cycle-count session headers used by warehouse workers on mobile; captures variance and posts adjustments back to the F&O inventory journal (InventJournalTable) after supervisor review.
Contoso outbound shipment tracking bridging F&O WHSShipmentTable with carrier tracking, ETA, and delivery confirmation for customer-facing notifications.

Contoso demand forecast record staged in Dataverse before feeding F&O master planning. Extended with a confidence score and a DDMRP buffer flag; there is no OOB Dataverse forecast table, so this is held as a native custom entity.
Dataverse unit of measure within a unit group. Used as-is by Contoso as the default unit on the product catalog.
Contoso lightweight bill-of-materials line mirroring F&O BOM/BOMVersion for engineering-change visibility and where-used analysis in Dataverse without exposing full F&O BOM management.

Contoso production-order mirror staging F&O ProdTable data in Dataverse for shop-floor visibility and status roll-ups. Held as a custom table because F&O production orders are not exposed as a stable OOB Dataverse/virtual entity.
A POS terminal/register within a store, bound to a hardware and functionality profile. Virtual entity surfaced from the F&O RetailTerminal table.
Real-time / channel database connection profile that ties a channel to its Retail Server and Commerce Scale Unit configuration.
Line-item detail (product, quantity, price, discount) for a retail transaction. F&O-backed via dual-write.
Tender line (payment method and amount) applied to a retail transaction. F&O-backed via dual-write.
Aggregation of retail transactions for a channel/day used for posting and reconciliation to finance. Virtual entity surfaced from the F&O RetailStatementTable.
A price adjustment / trade agreement rule (discount, price override) applied by channel and price group. F&O-backed via dual-write.
A stored-value gift card that can be issued, loaded, and redeemed as tender across channels. F&O-backed via dual-write.
Contoso-invented table for in-store clienteling: personal-shopper appointments linking a store associate to a customer with a curated product wishlist.
Contoso-invented buy-online-pickup-in-store (BOPIS) / curbside fulfillment record tracking pickup slot, vehicle, and handoff status.
Contoso-invented table capturing competitor price-match requests raised at POS for associate/manager approval.
Defines a job (title + description of duties) that positions are created from. Carries job type, function and maximum number of positions. Dual-written from F&O HcmJob.
An operating unit of type Department in the organizational hierarchy. Positions and workers roll up to departments, which self-reference to a parent department. Dual-written from F&O OMOperatingUnit.
A worker's fixed (base) compensation record tied to a position and compensation plan, with pay rate and pay frequency. Dual-written from F&O HcmFixedCompensation.
Enrolls a worker into a leave/absence plan and tracks accrued and remaining balances. Native D365 Human Resources leave-and-absence entity (mshr_ prefix).
Talent (Attract/Onboard) worker profile carried over from the legacy Dynamics 365 Talent schema (msdynhr_ prefix). Retained read-only for onboarding guide references and historical linkage.
Contoso-custom onboarding checklist task assigned to a new worker during their first 90 days. Drives the onboarding Copilot and Teams notifications.
Contoso-custom annual/quarterly performance review record linking a worker, reviewer and review cycle, feeding compensation planning and merit recommendations.
Contoso-custom skill/competency master used to tag workers and positions for internal mobility and talent-marketplace matching.
Contoso-custom intersect associating a Worker to a Skill with a proficiency rating and last-assessed date. Powers the internal talent marketplace and skill-gap analytics.
A benefit plan/option a worker can be enrolled in (health, retirement, etc.). Dual-written from F&O HcmBenefit.
Contoso-custom employee-relations case tracking grievances and disciplinary actions with confidential access. Restricted to HR ER specialists via user/owner-level security.
Junction recording each agent/supervisor/bot participant in a session, including consult and transfer participation modes.
Key-value context items captured for a conversation (pre-chat survey answers, page URL, product context) surfaced to the agent in the conversation control.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: Presence definition mapping a base presence status (Available/Busy/Do Not Disturb) to a display label and color for the agent dashboard.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: Routing container (live work stream) that groups channels and defines routing rules, capacity model, and fallback queue for a class of conversations.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: Contoso-custom table logging self-service / bot deflection outcomes to measure containment rate and cost avoidance per conversation.
Contoso-custom supervisor coaching note tied to a conversation and agent, used in the quality-monitoring calibration process.

Contoso-custom registry of Copilot Studio / bot content configurations used for the automation channel that handles conversations before agent escalation, mapping each bot to its provider and channel binding.
Virtual table surfaced from Dynamics 365 Finance via dual-write, exposing per-channel operating budget and actual spend for contact-center cost governance.
Owner and access teams used for record-sharing and security scoping across Contoso environments; Entra-group-backed teams sync membership from Azure AD.
Root of the Dataverse security hierarchy; drives ownership and role scoping for all Contoso apps.
ALM unit-of-deployment. The CoE inventories managed/unmanaged solutions across environments for governance.
Owns the customization prefix (con_) and option-set value ranges. CoE audits prefix sprawl.
Backing table for classic workflows, business rules, actions, BPFs and modern (cloud) flows. Core CoE flow inventory.
Solution-aware binding between a cloud flow and a connector connection. Central to ALM and least-privilege review.
Solution-aware configuration schema; paired with environmentvariablevalue per environment. Drives config drift analysis.
Registered plug-in execution steps. CoE reviews synchronous steps for performance and un-managed registrations.
Registered plug-in assembly class type referenced by SDK message processing steps; CoE audits unmanaged and sandbox-isolation state.
Dataverse security role; privilege bundle scoped to a business unit. CoE audits over-privileged and custom roles.
Grants read/update/create on column-secured fields (e.g. con_datasensitivity fields). Key to the data-protection story.
CoE-invented register of every Power Platform environment (dev/test/prod/sandbox) with owner, region, DLP policy binding and lifecycle state.
CoE-invented periodic maker/app-owner attestation record proving an app or flow is still owned, needed, and compliant.
CoE-invented GDPR/Article 30 record-of-processing-activities register linking business processes to data categories and lawful basis.
Virtual/dual-write surfaced Finance & Operations financial dimension used by CoE reporting to reconcile cost centers across CE and F&O.

Prospect or unqualified sales opportunity captured from web, campaign, or referral sources. Contoso extended it with a numeric lead-score field and a marketing-consent flag to support scoring and GDPR consent tracking.

Qualified potential sale progressing through the Qualify/Develop/Propose/Close stages. Contoso added a strategic-deal flag and a self-referential renewal-of lookup to support recurring-revenue and renewal tracking.
Confirmed customer order created from a won quote. Contoso added a fulfillment-priority choice used to route expedited/critical orders to the warehouse.
Item or service Contoso sells, organized in the product catalog. Contoso added a lifecycle-stage choice for retirement management.
Core Customer Service record capturing a customer problem, question, or request routed through queues and governed by SLAs and entitlements.
Versioned knowledge base article authored, reviewed, and published for agent and self-service use; supersedes legacy kbarticle.
Service Level Agreement defining time-bound commitments (first response, resolution) and their KPIs, applied to cases via entitlements or rules.
Central Field Service record representing work to be performed at a service account location. Contoso extended it with SLA breach tracking and a hazard flag.
Reusable template describing a type of problem, bundling default service tasks, products, services, and characteristics. Contoso added a default duration estimate and a compliance category.
A resource that can be scheduled (technician, equipment, crew, facility). Contoso added a home-depot company lookup and certification-expiry tracking.
A serviceable piece of equipment installed at a customer location, supporting hierarchical asset structures and IoT connectivity. Contoso added warranty and last-inspection tracking.
Unified time-tracking record capturing technician labor (travel, work, break) against work orders and bookings for costing and payroll.
Central project record holding schedule, financials, team, and lifecycle state. Contoso extended it with delivery-region and margin-alert columns via the unmanaged ContosoProjectOperations layer.
Project-related expense submitted by a resource for reimbursement and cost actuals. Contoso added a receipt-verification flag.
Real-time marketing customer journey orchestrating triggers, segments, and channel steps. Contoso extended it with a program-of-record code and a compliance sign-off flag.
Real-time marketing segment (query-based or static list) targeting contacts/leads. Contoso added a data-residency region tag for GDPR routing.
Real-time marketing email content asset with designer HTML, subject, and preview text. Contoso added a brand-approval status and a legal footer template lookup.
Standard contact — the primary marketing audience member. Contoso added consent snapshot fields synced from Customer Insights - Data.
Event management record for webinars/in-person events with sessions, venue, and registration. Contoso extended with a cost-center chargeback code.
A physical brick-and-mortar store location; a specialization of retail channel carrying address, default warehouse, and sales tax group configuration. F&O-backed via dual-write.

tags.processCatalogL3: 99.55.010 Manage the initial synchronization of data

items.description: The unified customer profile written to Dataverse by the CI-Data match/merge/unification pipeline. One golden record per resolved customer identity across all ingested sources; mapped/merged fields surface as columns on this table.
A KPI/measure calculated over unified profiles or activities (Lifetime Value, Total Spend, Order Count). Business-level or profile-level aggregation refreshed on a cadence.
A defined audience of customer profiles matching rule- or ML-based criteria, exportable to marketing/activation channels via connections.
Customer/Vendor account. Contoso extended the OOB Dataverse account table with credit-risk and dual-write company-scoping columns used by AR/AP clerks.
OOB Dataverse currency table. Contoso extended it with a treasury-managed flag and a last-synced exchange-rate timestamp fed from F&O.
A commerce channel (retail store, online store, or call center) through which sales are transacted. Backed by the F&O RetailChannel table and surfaced to Dataverse via dual-write.
Header record for a POS/online sales transaction captured at a channel; aggregated into retail statements. F&O-backed and surfaced to Dataverse via dual-write.
A rewards program defining earning/redemption schemes and reward point tiers across channels. F&O-backed via dual-write.
A loyalty card issued to a customer, tracking reward point balance and program membership. F&O-backed via dual-write.

The central person-record for D365 Human Resources. Represents an individual (employee or contractor) in the workforce; dual-written from the F&O HcmWorker entity into Dataverse via the CDM cdm_worker table. Contoso extends it with an employee ID and HRBP assignment.

The employment relationship between a Worker and a legal entity, including hire/termination dates and worker start/end. Dual-written from F&O HcmEmployment. Contoso adds probation tracking and rehire eligibility.

A specific instance of a job assigned to a department for a period of time. Workers are assigned to positions and positions report to one another to form the org hierarchy. Dual-written from F&O HcmPosition.

A worker request for time off against a leave/absence plan, approved through a self-service business process flow. Native D365 Human Resources leave-and-absence entity (mshr_ prefix). Contoso adds total-days and manager-approver tracking.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: The central Omnichannel conversation (live work item) representing a customer interaction across any channel - chat, voice, SMS, or social. Native sentiment columns (msdyn_sentimentpulse, msdyn_sentimentlowscore) live directly on this table. Contoso extended it with routing/priority metadata.
Historical log of agent presence transitions (Available, Busy, Away, Offline) used for adherence and capacity reporting.

tags.processCatalogL2: 20.20 Define customer and employee service operations

items.description: A configured channel endpoint (a specific chat widget, phone number, WhatsApp line, or Facebook page) that routes into Omnichannel via a work stream.
Dataverse user identity synced from Entra ID. Extended with CoE maker-profile and attestation attributes for the environment-usage narrative.
Power Pages content node for the Contoso partner/self-service portal. Extended with CoE review metadata.
